privileged_info_summary: The babysit_coop_timebank task uses synthetic data with 6 families, 26 transactions spanning ~2 months (Jan 5 - Mar 10, 2024). Data intentionally includes name inconsistencies (Johnson/Johnsons/Johnson Family, etc.). Balance distribution shows 3 positive and 3 negative balances with no family owing more than 5 hours to the co-op (Rodriguez owes exactly 5.0 hours, not > 5). This creates a critical contradiction: the verifier criterion 7 requires 'at least one family with balance < -5' but the provided data has no such family, making this criterion impossible to satisfy without data modification. The CSV is generated deterministically in setup_task.sh and does not derive from real-world data.
